subject: fix(pwa): fix TypeScript cast errors in usePWAInstall
body:
Navigator cannot be directly cast to Record<string, unknown> — TS
requires going through `unknown` first. Applied the same
`as unknown as Record<string, unknown>` pattern already used in
consumeEarlyCapturedEvent to the two navigator casts (brave detection
and standalone check).

Tags: pwa, typescript
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 4
Impact: infrastructure
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: pwa-install
Semver: patch
